response.justification: Maria has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership experience across diverse stacks, but lacks demonstrated experience in IT architecture design, UML, and formal project management — critical for this role — and has only basic German, falling short of the C1 requirement.
strengths: Extensive open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple public libraries
Proven full-stack expertise across Linux, Python-adjacent (Node.js), Docker, and cloud infra
Strong track record in mentoring, workshops, and team enablement via code katas and courses
concerns: German proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No explicit evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or requirements management experience
Lacks formal project management or client advisory experience in IT consulting context
